title: The Briefing: Financial Services
summary: Anthropic hosted a virtual briefing on Claude deployment in financial services, featuring leaders from major banks sharing implementations. The event showcased organizational adoption of Claude across the banking sector.
writeup: This video is a recording of a virtual briefing Anthropic hosted on deploying Claude across financial services, with leaders from major banks describing their implementations. It documents how the banking sector is adopting Claude at an organizational level, drawing on firsthand accounts rather than vendor framing alone. The takeaway is a sector-specific view of large language model deployment in finance, presented through the experiences of the institutions putting it into practice.
